home.heroSubtitle: Track, manage, and showcase your football jersey collection. Every shirt, every story.
home.feature1Desc: Log every jersey with team, player, season, and purchase details. Keep your collection organized and up to date.
home.feature2Desc: Add high-quality photos of each jersey. Your collection deserves to be seen in its best light.
home.feature3Desc: Share your favourite jerseys with the world. Let fellow collectors discover and admire your collection.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in or create an account to manage your collection.
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
auth.checkEmail: Please check your email to confirm your signup.
auth.enterEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password.

dashboard.title: My Collection
dashboard.setUsernameDesc: Your jerseys appear in the showcase — add a username so others can find your collection.
dashboard.noJerseysDesc: Start building your collection by adding your first jersey.

jerseyForm.notesPlaceholder: Any additional notes about this jersey...
jerseyForm.privateNoteHint: This note is never shown in the public showcase or to other users.
jerseyForm.privateNotePlaceholder: Authentication number, condition details, personal memories...
jerseyForm.requiredFields: Team, player, and season are required.

deleteButton.confirm: Delete this jersey? This cannot be undone.

showcase.title: Showcase
showcase.noJerseysEmpty: No jerseys have been shared publicly yet. Be the first!

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.subtitle: Your username appears on your jerseys in the public showcase so other collectors can find your collection.
profile.usernameHint: 3–20 characters. Letters, numbers, and underscores only.
profile.usernameInvalid: Username must be 3–20 characters. Letters, numbers, and underscores only.
profile.usernameTaken: This username is already taken. Try another one.
